items.title: Portronics Pure Sound Pro X2 Home Theatre System Launched in India With 150W Sound Output, Four EQ Modes
items.summary: Portronics Pure Sound Pro X2 home theatre system launched in India. The new 5.1-channel audio system offers 150W output. The setup comprises a soundbar with three 2-inch drivers...
